IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: AID FOR SPECIAL NEEDS CHILDREN AND OTHER SCHOOL RELATED ACTIVITIES.
IRS990.MissionDesc: AID FOR SPECIAL NEEDS CHILDREN AND OTHER SCHOOL RELATED ACTIVITIES.
IRS990.Desc: PROVIDE AN EARLY CHILDHOOD DEVELOPMENT EDUCATIONAL ENVIRONMENT FOR YOUNG CHILDRENWITH SPECIAL NEEDS AND THEIR NON-HANDICAPPED SIBLINGS IN AN INTEGRATED SETTING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GRANTS TO CHARITIES WERE APPROVED AND DOCUMENTED IN THE BOARD MEETING MINUTES. THESE GRANTS WERE A RESULT OF THE DISSOLUTION OF CHILDS HOPE LEARNING CENTER.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990 governing body review Part VI line 11
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PROGRAM DIRECTOR REVIEWS 990 BEFORE SUBMITTING AND THE BOARD REVIEWS 990 AT NEXT BOARD MEETING

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: CEO executive director top management comp Part VI line 15a
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: BOARD PERFOMS A YEARLY REVIEW OF THE PROGRAM DIRECTOR

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Governing documents etc available to public Part VI line 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GOVERNING DOCUMENTS AND FINANICAL STATEMENTS ARE ON FILE AT THE OFFICE AND IS AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Cessation of or significant change to any program service Part III line 3
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION HAS DECIDED TO DISSOLVE AND WILL NO LONGER BE PROVIDING PROGRAM SERVICES.
